user_message:
CODE REVIEW TASK

Review the current uncommitted diff in /Users/teslamint/workspace/entirecontext against plan docs/plans/review-fixes-current-worktree.md. Focus on correctness, tests, security/reliability, and merge-blocking issues. Do not edit files. Return findings first with file:line, severity P0-P3, autofix_class (safe_auto/gated_auto/manual/advisory), and residual actionable work. If no issues, say so clearly. Scope includes current worktree changes only.
assistant_summary: I’ll review only the current uncommitted worktree against the specified plan, starting with the plan and diff, then I’ll run diagnostics/static checks on the touched files before giving a verdict.
